keyEvents.text: Goal! Croatia 1, Ghana 0. Petar Sucic (Croatia) right footed shot from outside the box to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Mateo Kovacic.
Substitution, Ghana. Kojo Peprah Oppong replaces Jonas Adjetey.
Substitution, Ghana. Abdul Fatawu replaces Elisha Owusu.
Substitution, Croatia. Igor Matanovic replaces Ante Budimir.
Ivan Perisic (Croatia) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Substitution, Ghana. Brandon Thomas-Asante replaces Jordan Ayew.
Substitution, Ghana. Ernest Nuamah replaces Kamaldeen Sulemana.

Goal! Croatia 1, Ghana 1. Derrick Luckassen (Ghana) left footed shot from very close range to the bottom right corner. Assisted by Ernest Nuamah with a cross following a set piece situation.Goal awarded following VAR Review.
Substitution, Croatia. Mario Pasalic replaces Mateo Kovacic.
Goal! Croatia 2, Ghana 1. Nikola Vlasic (Croatia) header from the centre of the box to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Luka Modric with a cross following a corner.
Substitution, Ghana. Caleb Yirenkyi replaces Kwasi Sibo.
Substitution, Croatia. Josko Gvardiol replaces Nikola Vlasic.
Substitution, Croatia. Marco Pasalic replaces Martin Baturina.
Kojo Peprah Oppong (Ghana) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Substitution, Panama. José Fajardo replaces Tomás Rodríguez.
José Fajardo (Panama) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Jarell Quansah (England) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Goal! Panama 0, England 1. Jude Bellingham (England) left footed shot from the centre of the box to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Bukayo Saka with a cross following a corner.
Substitution, England. Djed Spence replaces Jarell Quansah.
Substitution, England. Noni Madueke replaces Bukayo Saka.
Goal! Panama 0, England 2. Harry Kane (England) header from the centre of the box to the top left corner. Assisted by Jude Bellingham with a cross.
Substitution, Panama. Ismael Díaz replaces Yoel Bárcenas.
Substitution, England. Eberechi Eze replaces Jude Bellingham.
Substitution, Panama. Azarías Londoño replaces José Luis Rodríguez.
Andrés Andrade (Panama) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Substitution, England. Jordan Henderson replaces Elliot Anderson.
Substitution, England. Ollie Watkins replaces Harry Kane.
Substitution, Panama. Alberto Quintero replaces Carlos Harvey.
Substitution, Panama. Éric Davis replaces Jorge Gutiérrez.
Goal! Congo DR 0, Uzbekistan 1. Eldor Shomurodov (Uzbekistan) left footed shot from the left side of the box to the top right corner. Assisted by Abbosbek Fayzullaev.
